heading: Treatment of certain benefits and costs
label: 2213a Treatment of certain benefits and costs
notes: CodificationSection was enacted as part of the Water Resources Development Act of 2020, and not as part of the Water Resources Development Act of 1986 which comprises this chapter.

Amendments2022—Subsec. (a). substituted “a flood risk management or coastal storm risk management project in a region” for “flood risk management project that incidentally generates seismic safety benefits in regions”.Pub. L. 117–263
“Secretary” DefinedSecretary means the Secretary of the Army, see , set out as a note under .section 2 of div. AA of Pub. L. 116–260section 2201 of this title
amendments: Amendments2022—Subsec. (a). substituted “a flood risk management or coastal storm risk management project in a region” for “flood risk management project that incidentally generates seismic safety benefits in regions”.Pub. L. 117–263

children.heading: In general
children.label: a In general
children.text: In the case of a flood risk management or coastal storm risk management project in a region of moderate or high seismic hazard, for the purpose of a benefit-cost analysis for the project, the Secretary shall not include in that analysis any additional design and construction costs resulting from addressing seismic concerns.
included in the total project cost; and
subject to cost-share requirements otherwise applicable to the project.
